Increases the maximum number of targets you can hit with a single weapon swing.

rune.stones_ef_bridge.armor_negation_maj: Rune of the Great True Strike
rune.stones_ef_bridge.impact_major.name: Rune of the Great Impact
rune.stones_ef_bridge.impact_major.desc: Significantly increases your base impact, breaking enemy guards easily.
rune.stones_ef_bridge.impact_minor.name: Rune of Impact
rune.stones_ef_bridge.impact_minor.desc: Increases your base impact, making it easier to break enemy guards.
rune.stones_ef_bridge.weight_major.name: Rune of the Great Feather
rune.stones_ef_bridge.weight_major.desc: Massively reduces your overall equipment weight.
rune.stones_ef_bridge.weight_minor.name: Rune of the Feather
rune.stones_ef_bridge.weight_minor.desc: Reduces your overall equipment weight, improving attack speed and stamina consumption.
message.stones_ef_bridge.skillbook_consu: You absorb the magical energy of the sealed book and gain experience!
gui.stones_ef_bridge.bloat_desc_ritual1: §7Apply directly to a Milestone Rune in your inventory.
gui.stones_ef_bridge.bloat_desc_warning2: §7Every existing enchant rolls. If 1 enchant, chance is 50%.
gui.stones_ef_bridge.bloat_desc_severity: §7+3 Levels: R x 1.5% (%s%%) | +2 Levels: R x 5.0% (%s%%)
gui.stones_ef_bridge.bloat_desc_conseque: §3Levels of Epic Fight Rune Enchantments offer NO skill benefit.
tooltip.stones_ef_bridge.ritual_hint: right-click Milestone Rune with complete stack.
flavor.stones_ef_bridge.generic.1: We do not learn to move; we only remember the dance we performed before the clay was molded.
flavor.stones_ef_bridge.generic.2: The body is a cage of bone, yet a single, perfect reflex can shatter the bars for a heartbeat.
flavor.stones_ef_bridge.generic.3: It is not the muscle that strikes, nor the blade that cuts. It is the unseen thread that pulls them both.
flavor.stones_ef_bridge.generic.4: Step not into the light to escape the blow, but become the shadow it passes through.
flavor.stones_ef_bridge.generic.5: The wind in your lungs is borrowed; the stillness in your mind is yours to keep.
flavor.stones_ef_bridge.generic.6: Listen to the weight of the stone. It knows the path of least resistance.
flavor.stones_ef_bridge.generic.7: Every strike is a word written in the air, erased before the ink can dry.
flavor.stones_ef_bridge.generic.8: Gravity is but the first covenant. To break it, you must first agree with the earth.
flavor.stones_ef_bridge.generic.9: You wear the stance of a thousand dead kings, yet none of them are here to catch your fall.
flavor.stones_ef_bridge.generic.10: In the perfect stillness before the storm, the weapon is already at rest in its target.
